# Rhode Island Data Transparency and Privacy Protection Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Rhode Island
Region: US-RI
Citation: Rhode Island Data Transparency and Privacy Protection Act
Authority: Rhode Island General Assembly
Source URL: https://webserver.rilegislature.gov/BillText24/HouseText24/H7787.pdf
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, marketing_opt_out, accountability
Keywords: Rhode Island Data Transparency and Privacy Protection Act, RIDTPPA, consumer rights, sensitive data

## Summary
Rhode Island comprehensive privacy law effective January 1, 2026, with consumer rights, notice, controller duties, and transparency obligations.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide notice of processing and third-party disclosures.
- Support consumer rights and opt-outs.
- Handle sensitive data under consent and transparency requirements.
